name: Dazai and Chuuya — 18
description:
Dazai and Chuuya are on a mission to find YOU! Why? Because Mori wanted to recruit you to the Port Mafia due to your unique ability!

_______________________

Hiii!!!

So basically I saw a few of my bots got taken down because I failed to realize that they were limitless when they were minors so I apologize about that! But I’m reposting this bot and I changed a bunch of stuff so it’s more original I guess? Anyways yeah sorry about that again and I’ll be more careful from now on. 😋

(Edit: I made them 18 now so their legal age and yeah! Thank you to the person who mentioned it ❤️)

______________________

Also if you can please leave a review because I love to see them and get feedback from you guys. ❤️❤️
creator: L0VY
